input: Run budget management on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected budget management output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the budget management workflow

input: Apply budget management to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive budget management analysis with evidence-tagged findings

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to budget management
